Author: Rey Alex
Name: Gpose Cast
Description: A compact GPose casting tool. Search visible actors, import overworld players into GPose for Brio/Ktisis, build a picked group, and hide everyone else locally for cleaner screenshots.
Punchline: Build a picked GPose cast and hide everyone else.
Changelog: 0.9.0.0 release candidate: imports linked fashion accessories, ornaments, wings, mounts, and weapon visibility through the linked-child import path; hides original source duplicates; restores hidden actors; removes temporary imported actors on restore, GPose exit, or plugin unload; keeps isolation enforced for late arrivals.
